level_1.name: Hexing Aunt Emma
level_1.fun_text: Emma once cursed a waiter for bringing the wrong soup. Lucas still has nightmares about the birthday incident.

level_1.name: Crybaby Cousin Olivia
level_1.fun_text: Olivia cries at commercials, speeches, and once at a particularly beautiful salad. She NEEDS Emma nearby.

level_1.name: Judgy Grandma Sophia
level_1.fun_text: Sophia rates every outfit in the room on a scale of 1 to 'disappointing'. She wants front-row seats.

level_1.name: Escape Plan Uncle Liam
level_1.fun_text: Liam has already mapped every exit. If Sophia starts judging his tie, he WILL vanish into the night.

level_1.name: Buffet Raider Noah
level_1.fun_text: Noah is here for exactly three things: cake, steak, and one legendary dance move he's been practicing.

level_1.name: Selfie Tornado Ava
level_1.fun_text: Ava takes 47 selfies per hour. With Mia nearby, that number doubles. The flash never stops.

level_1.name: DJ Wannabe Mia
level_1.fun_text: Mia claims she's calm. She is not calm. The moment music starts, she becomes the unofficial dance commander.

level_1.name: Villain Ex Lucas
level_1.fun_text: Seating Lucas near Emma or Charlotte is the wedding equivalent of juggling live grenades.

level_1.name: Frost Queen Charlotte
level_1.fun_text: Charlotte will smile politely, but if Lucas is within 10 feet the room temperature drops to arctic.

level_1.name: Grand Entrance Ethan
level_1.fun_text: Ethan doesn't walk into rooms. He ARRIVES. He needs space, spotlight, and an escape route for drama.

level_1.name: Table Inspector Isabella
level_1.fun_text: Isabella notices if the napkin fold is 2 degrees off. Her VIP table better BE a VIP table.

level_1.name: Gossip Lord James
level_1.fun_text: James knows everyone's secrets. Sit him with Amelia and the entire office drama gets live commentary.

level_1.name: Spy Amelia
level_1.fun_text: Amelia is friendly with everyone, but strategically positions herself for maximum people-watching intel.

level_1.name: Cake Destroyer Benjamin
level_1.fun_text: Benjamin came for cake, stayed for chaos, and will absolutely dominate the dance floor by 10 PM.

level_1.name: Chaos Agent Harper
level_1.fun_text: Harper and Benjamin together guarantee fun chaos, loud cheering, and at least one broken glass.

level_2.name: Spy Amelia
level_2.fun_text: Amelia is friendly with everyone, but strategically positions herself for maximum people-watching intel.

level_2.name: Cake Destroyer Benjamin
level_2.fun_text: Benjamin came for cake, stayed for chaos, and will absolutely dominate the dance floor by 10 PM.

level_2.name: Chaos Agent Harper
level_2.fun_text: Harper and Benjamin together guarantee fun chaos, loud cheering, and at least one broken glass.

level_2.name: Tinfoil Hat Uncle Rick
level_2.fun_text: Rick thinks the wedding planner is a government agent. Keep him away from anyone with a clipboard.

level_2.name: Wine Hoarding Aunt Debra
level_2.fun_text: Debra has already hidden two bottles under her shawl. Sophia approves. Everyone else is concerned.

level_2.name: Dramatic Nephew Tyler
level_2.fun_text: Tyler and Zoey broke up last Tuesday. They are both pretending the other doesn't exist. Badly.

level_2.name: Revenge Dress Zoey
level_2.fun_text: Zoey wore THE dress specifically so Tyler would regret everything. Mission accomplished.

level_2.name: Microphone Thief Gary
level_2.fun_text: Gary WILL steal the mic for an uninvited speech. It's not a question of if, but when.

level_2.name: Allergic-to-Fun Priscilla
level_2.fun_text: Priscilla finds loud laughter 'excessive'. Benjamin's existence offends her on a molecular level.

level_2.name: Toast King Oliver
level_2.fun_text: Oliver has prepared a 20-minute toast. Nobody asked. He doesn't care. VIP seating is non-negotiable.

level_2.name: Photo Bomber Derek
level_2.fun_text: Derek appears in the background of every single photo. It's a gift. An unwanted, unstoppable gift.

level_2.name: Napping Grandpa Walter
level_2.fun_text: Walter will fall asleep by 8 PM regardless of seating. Just keep him near an exit for easy extraction.

level_2.name: Main Character Stella
level_2.fun_text: Stella thinks this is HER night. Oliver's toast threatens her spotlight. This cannot stand.

level_3.name: One-Upper Cousin Marcus
level_3.fun_text: You went to Paris? Marcus went TWICE. You got promoted? Marcus bought the company. Allegedly.

level_3.name: Bridezilla's Mom Linda
level_3.fun_text: Linda has opinions about EVERYTHING. The flowers, the food, the seating, your life choices. Everything.

level_3.name: Silent Assassin Cousin Fiona
level_3.fun_text: Fiona says nothing but her stare speaks volumes. Marcus once bragged near her and aged 10 years instantly.

level_3.name: Karaoke Maniac Dave
level_3.fun_text: Dave doesn't need a karaoke machine. He IS the karaoke machine. Mia considers him a worthy rival.

level_3.name: Groom's Mom Patricia
level_3.fun_text: Patricia and Linda have a cold war older than the bride. Same table = nuclear wedding meltdown.

level_3.name: Toddler Wrangler Aunt Sarah
level_3.fun_text: Sarah brought three kids under five. She needs a seat near the exit and a double espresso. And wine.

level_3.name: Conspiracy Buddy Phil
level_3.fun_text: Phil and Rick together will discuss aliens for 3 hours straight. Nobody else at the table will survive.

level_3.name: Diet Police Aunt Marge
level_3.fun_text: Marge will comment on what you eat. Noah's third plate will trigger a 15-minute nutrition lecture.

level_3.name: Wedding Crasher Kyle
level_3.fun_text: Nobody knows who invited Kyle. Kyle doesn't know who invited Kyle. But Kyle is having the time of his life.

level_3.name: Emotional Wreck Best Man Jake
level_3.fun_text: Jake has cried four times today and the ceremony hasn't started. His speech will destroy everyone.
